rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees referencing component ports within the component type scope.
Place implementation-level bindings (assignments) within implementation scopes.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use case-provided bounds and visible feature names for range assumptions and guarantees.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in guarantees; avoid implementation details.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq <variable_name> : bool = <expression>;` to define boolean variables.
Ensure type alignment between AGREE expressions and AADL data types.
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions without corresponding ports or constants.
Avoid range comparisons or equality checks on Boolean or opaque data ports unless a numeric scalar representation exists.
